page_metadata.biotools__summary:
IMGT/PhyloGene is the IMGT® tool to compute and draw phylogenetic trees for immunoglobulin (IG) and T cell receptor (TR) V-REGION nucleotide sequences.
Analysis is based on the IMGT-ONTOLOGY concepts.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary:
IMGT/PhyloGene is the IMGT® tool to compute and draw phylogenetic trees for immunoglobulin (IG) and T cell receptor (TR) V-REGION nucleotide sequences.
Analysis is based on the IMGT-ONTOLOGY concepts.
